theme: knightly assembly hall with warm torchlight and cool teal rune accents

pillar_stone_knight_hall.usage: major pillar silhouette, backline architecture, possible foreground occlusion

brazier_wall_torch.usage: wall torch accent, repeated hall lighting prop

banner_war_hanging.usage: heraldic banner, vertical accent between pillars

bench_broken.usage: low clutter prop, breakage flavor, possible throwable inspiration

dagger_ceremonial_pickup.usage: prototype thrown-item or pickup art for restored item loop

archway_grand_stone.usage: rear-stage architectural frame or side landmark

window_stained_glass.usage: upper-wall stained glass accent and heraldic color break

dais_raised_stone.usage: ceremonial oath platform or rear-stage focal landmark

floor_chunk_flagstone_cracked.usage: combat-plane floor dressing and cracked flagstone texture accent

weapon_rack_shields_spears.usage: side-pocket hall dressing with implied interactable energy
